name: PER_ROLES_DN
description: Stores the roles that are used in the system.  Data normally denormalized from LDAP via the Identity Governance Framework apis (IGF).

columns.Name: ROLE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: ROLE_GUID
columns.Comments: ?Globally Unique Identifier for the Role

columns.Name: ABSTRACT_ROLE
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate it is an Abstract Role

columns.Name: JOB_ROLE
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate it is an Job Role

columns.Name: DATA_ROLE
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate it is an Data Role

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate it is an Active Role

columns.Name: ROLE_COMMON_NAME
columns.Comments: The Common Name (CN) defined within LDAP.

columns.Name: MULTITENANCY_COMMON_NAME
columns.Comments: The Multitenancy Common Name Defined in LDAP

columns.Name: ROLE_DISTINGUISHED_NAME
columns.Comments: The Distinguished Name (DN) defined within LDAP - Contains group information etc. to provide a unique name.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: DELEGATION_ALLOWED
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate it is the Role can be delegated

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_ID
columns.Comments: EXTERNAL_ID

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_ROLE
columns.Comments: ?Flag to Indicate it is an External Role

columns.Name: DUTY_ROLE
columns.Comments: DUTY_ROLE
